question_X: Do you travel any?

Are you eligible for promotion?

question_X: Did you have nice bosses?

answer_Y: I'm moving on to something totally different.

answer_Y_cz: Pořád chci pracovat v tom stejném oboru.

question_X: Have you tried that kind of work before?
question_X_cz: Zkusila jsi tuhle práci už někdy dřív?

question_X: Will you be working full-time?
answer_Y_cz: Zatím je to jen na zkrácený.

question_X: Do you work long hours?
answer_Y: I generally work 50 hours per week.

question_X: Do you not like your boss?
Do you have to travel far?
answer_Y: It would be a pretty long commute.

question_X: Did you like your previous job?
answer_Y: I hated it, which is why I needed a change.

question_X: Do you work with a lot of people?
Is it technical?
Have you ever taken a day off sick when you were not actually sick?

answer_Y: I work at a desk, so no lifting involved.

answer_Y: This will be my nineteenth year.

answer_Y: I don't have to deal with customers.

Would you be interested in a new industry altogether?
